events.content: Build observer URLs with a raw single-encoded fragment: Build observer URLs with a raw single-encoded fragment

raw.question: Build observer URLs with a raw single-encoded fragment
raw.chosen: Build observer URLs with a raw single-encoded fragment
raw.reasoning: Go re-encodes URL.Fragment when String() is called, so assigning fragment.Encode() there double-encodes browser parameters.

retrospective.summary: Resolved PR 46 against main, accepted the mount polling changes from PR 45, fixed observer launch URLs to use a raw single-encoded fragment, and added browser-style fragment parsing assertions.
